sizing_rule.note: Position size = Account Size × (optimal f / largest historical loss). Optimal f derived from EGM formula maximizing geometric mean HPR using AHPR and SD of historical trade returns.

source_rule_text: Position size should be based on a fractional f value derived from the optimal f calculation, where f represents the fraction of account equity to risk per trade, calculated as the ratio of largest loss to account size multiplied by the optimal f factor.
